channel.title: Tatum Time — A Celtics Blog For Serious Fans
channel.description: Boston Celtics analysis, recaps and deep dives by Dan MacLean.

item.title: Celtics Draft Grades By Pick
item.description: The 2026 NBA Draft is in the books, and Boston walked away with a pair of intriguing combo forwards. Here's how each pick grades out. Round 1, Pick 27 — Chris Cenac Jr. (Grade: B-) A 19-year-old forward out of Houston, C…

item.title: Bust Out The Brooms: 76ers And Lakers Both Swept!!!
item.description: Sometimes the basketball gods give you a perfect weekend. 🧹🧹 The Philadelphia 76ers and the Los Angeles Lakers — both swept. Four-and-out for each. There isn't a whole lot of analysis required here, just a moment to soak…

item.title: Processing… Celtics Dealt Early Postseason Exit
item.description: This one stings. As heavy favorites carrying the third-best championship odds in the league, the Celtics had the 76ers right where they wanted them — up 3–1 in the first round. Then it all came apart. Boston dominated Ga…

item.title: NBA Playoffs Preview: (2) Celtics vs. (7) 76ers
item.description: The bracket is set, and the second-seeded Celtics 56–26 draw the seventh-seeded 76ers 45–37 in a first-round showdown. Boston opens as a massive -12.5 favorite in Game 1 and holds the third-best championship odds in the …

item.title: The 2025–26 Season: Underrated Contributors
item.description: The season is in full swing, so let's shine a light on the names that don't always make the highlight reels but quietly move the needle for the C's. Luka Garza · C · 5th Season 7.8 PPG 4.0 RPG 58% FG 43% 3PT Boston has h…

item.title: April Showers: Celtics Drain 29 Threes In Blowout
item.description: April 10, 2026 was a downpour. The Celtics buried 29 three-pointers — tying the NBA single-game record — in a 144–118 demolition of the Pelicans, their 10th straight win. Make It Rain ☔ Sam Hauser led the barrage with ei…

item.title: Happy Easter!!! 🐣🏀💚
item.description: Happy Easter from Tatum Time! 🐣☘️ The C's brought a basket full of buckets, beating the Raptors 115–101 on Easter Sunday. Enjoy the day, fam. 💚

item.title: Jayson Tatum Drops 80 In The First Half!? APRIL FOOLS!
item.description: Did Jayson Tatum just drop 80 in the first half? ...April Fools! 🃏 But what actually happened was plenty fun: Boston drenched the Heat 147–129. The Dynamic Duo Tatum: a triple-double — 25 points, 18 rebounds, 11 assists,…

item.title: Celtics (50-24) Clinch Playoff Berth For 12th Straight Season
item.description: Punch the ticket. With a 114–99 win over Charlotte, the Celtics 50–24 officially clinched a playoff berth for the 12th consecutive season. Led by Jayson Tatum and anchored by an elite defense — a 106.9 defensive rating, …

item.title: Baylor Scheierman Proving His Worth Off The Bench
item.description: Boston's second unit keeps getting steadier, and a big reason is former Creighton standout Baylor Scheierman. The wing has turned bench minutes into real production. Across March, Scheierman averaged 27 minutes a night a…
